Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6C05 "GALAXIANDX-6C05" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Galaxian DX (Arlasoft - 2021).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Removed the calls to the kernal load routine ($FFD5) at $810F and the kernal save routine ($FFD8) at $804A to remove disk access from the game (for high score loading and saving).
